2024-09-04.body: Invest in GICRE's Offer for Sale and diversify your portfolio with a trusted name in the insurance sector. The Offer for Sale is now open. To know more👉

2024-09-16.title: 📢 Clearing Holiday Alert!
2024-09-16.body: Today, 16th Sept 2024, is a settlement holiday on account of Eid-e-Milad. Therefore, trades from 13th & 16th Sept will be settled on 17th Sept 2024, i.e., tomorrow. All withdrawal requests will also be processed on 17th Sept 2024. For more details👉

2024-09-17.title: 📢 Clearing Holiday Alert!
2024-09-17.body: Tomorrow, 18th Sept 2024, is a settlement holiday for Eid-e-Milad. Therefore, trades from 17th & 18th Sept will be settled on 19th Sept 2024. All withdrawal requests will be processed on 19th Sept 2024. For more details👉

2024-09-18.title: 📢 Clearing Holiday Alert!
2024-09-18.body: Today, 18th Sept 2024, is a settlement holiday on account of Eid-e-Milad. Therefore, trades from 17th & 18th Sept will be settled on 19th Sept 2024. All withdrawals will also be processed on 19th Sept, i.e., tomorrow. For more details 👉

2024-09-30.title: 📢 Take Control with Smart Step!
2024-09-30.body: Simplify your trades with Smart Step. Set your buy and sell levels, average out with ease, and stay in control without constant monitoring. To know more, check out the blog 👉

2024-10-01.title: 🔒Lock-in gains with Smart Trail!
2024-10-01.body: Never let sudden market moves turn your gains into losses. With Smart Trail, your Trailing SL Orders adjust as prices move in your favor. Set your exit points and stay ahead. Click to learn more👉

2024-10-01.title: 📢 Trading Holiday Alert!
2024-10-01.body: Tomorrow, October 2nd, 2024, is a trading holiday for NSE, BSE, and MCX on account of Mahatma Gandhi Jayanti. All withdrawal requests will be processed on Thursday, i.e., 3rd October 2024.

2024-10-04.title: 📈 Start Trading with MTF!
2024-10-04.body: Margin Trading Facility (MTF) is now available. Access up to 4x margin and trade across 900 stocks. Don’t let this opportunity pass—Activate MTF today. To know more👉

2024-10-09.title: 📈New Trading Policy Update!
2024-10-09.body: Now, sell your holdings and get 100% of the proceeds ready for same-day trading. More flexibility, more opportunities—right when you need them! To know more👉

2024-10-18.title: Smart Exit 👉 Manage All at One Go!
2024-10-18.body: Tired of juggling multiple trades? Set one 🎯 P&L target for all your positions with Smart Exit, and let the system handle a smooth exit. Don’t miss out - learn more 👉

2024-10-21.title: ⏳ Smart Limit Order 👉 Time Your Trades!
2024-10-21.body: Take full control by setting exact entry points with Smart Limit Orders. Adjust expiry times & easily convert them into market orders when needed. Click to explore more  👉

2024-10-22.title: 📢 Live Webinar (हिंदी में)!
2024-10-22.body: Smart order live webinar (हिंदी में) is starting in less than 5 minutes at 12 PM! Don’t miss out on the chance to learn about Smart Orders with real-time market demos. Click to join now 👉

2024-10-28.title: 🎉FYERS Web Just Got Better!
2024-10-28.body: Explore the latest enhancements in FYERS Web and elevate your trading experience. Learn more 👉

2024-11-01.title: 🪔 Diwali Special: Muhurat Trading Alert!
2024-11-01.body: Today (Friday), join the auspicious Muhurat Trading session from 6:00 PM to 7:00 PM across all segments. Ensure a smooth trading experience by adding funds in advance, and make the most of this special opportunity to kick off Samvat 2081 on a high note. Click for details 👉

2024-11-27.title: 🎯 Simplistic Interface for Smarter Options Trading!
2024-11-27.body: Your options trading just got easier. The  Scalper Terminal lets you compare CE, PE, and the Spot side-by-side, trade direct from the charts, and customize your options chain. Click to explore the new features now👉🏻

2024-11-30.title: 📢 3 Months of Zero Brokerage on NSE Commodities!
2024-11-30.body: Starting December 1, enjoy three months of Zero Brokerage on NSE Commodity trades! Don’t miss this opportunity to trade without fees. Explore the offer to know more—click on Read More. Get ready to save big! ⏳ Limited-time only!

2024-12-12.title: ⌛Still Waiting for Trades to Trigger?
2024-12-12.body: Stop waiting! Set your target price with Good Till Triggered (GTT) orders and let trades execute automatically at the right price. Want to know more? Discover how👉

2024-12-13.body: Experience precision and speed with the Scalper Terminal! Compare CE, PE, and the Spot side-by-side, trade directly from charts, and customize your options chain—all designed to help you trade smarter and faster. Click to explore the features now👉

2024-12-18.body: Create Price Alerts instantly by clicking the ➕ on the price axis directly from the chart on our web platform. Try it now and stay ahead of the market!

2024-12-20.body: No more waiting,no more hassle - sell pledged holdings instantly. Manage margins efficiently and handle trades seamlessly. Ready to enhance your trading experience? Click to know more👉🏻

2024-12-25.title: 📢 Trading Holiday Alert!
2024-12-25.body: Today, December 25th, 2024, is a trading holiday for NSE, BSE, and MCX on account of Christmas. All withdrawal requests will be processed on Thursday, December 26th, 2024.

2025-01-01.title: 🌟2024 Highlights You Can’t Miss!
2025-01-01.body: 2024 was a year of tremendous growth, learning, and innovation. From introducing smarter features to successfully navigating market swings, we’ve had an eventful year. Tap to revisit the top moments. Here's to bold trades and a successful 2025! 🚀

2025-01-07.title: ⚡ Tired of losing profits by over-trading?
2025-01-07.body: With Take a break, you can pause trading for the rest of the day after closing your positions. Stay in control, avoid over-trading, and safeguard your profits—all with a single click. Click to read more and improve your trading strategy 👉

2025-07-23.title: MCX Update: Trading Resumed!
2025-07-23.body: Trading on MCX is back online. The earlier exchange-side issue has been resolved, and everything is now functioning smoothly. You can continue trading as usual.

2025-09-03.title: 📢Scheduled MF Maintenance
2025-09-03.body: Mutual Fund services will be unavailable today from 6:00 PM to 2:00 AM due to system upgrades. During this period, services like placing Buy/Redeem orders, creating new mandates, and related activities will not be accessible.

2025-09-05.title: 📢 Clearing Holiday Alert!
2025-09-05.body: Today, 5th Sept 2025, is a settlement holiday on account of Eid-e-Milad. In addition, 8th Sept 2025 (Monday) is also a settlement holiday. Trades from 4th–8th Sept will be settled on 9th Sept 2025 (Tuesday). All withdrawals during this period will also be processed on 9th Sept. For more details 👉🏻

2025-09-06.title: 🔔 Mock Trading Session Alert!
2025-09-06.body: We're participating in the exchange’s mock trading session today from 11 AM to 3:30 PM. During this time, you may notice price fluctuations on the charts.

2025-09-08.title: 📢 Clearing Holiday Update!
2025-09-08.body: As 5th Sept (Fri) and 8th Sept (Mon) are settlement holidays on account of Eid-e-Milad, trades from 4th & 5th will settle on 9th Sept, while trades from 8th & 9th will settle on 10th Sept. Withdrawals (Instant & Normal) will resume on 10th Sept.

2025-09-13.title: 🔔 Mock Trading Session Alert!

2025-10-01.body: All feeds are now live across FYERS Web, App, and Trader. Normal service has resumed. Thank you for your patience.
